get.summary: Gets a CSV template for bulk upload based on an application form.
get.description: Returns a CSV file with headers matching the application form's fields in position order. This template can be used to prepare data for bulk upload.

parameters.name: applicationFormId
parameters.description: The PDC-generated ID of an application form.

200.description: A CSV template file with headers only.

Content-Disposition.description: Suggests a filename for the downloaded template
